<a id="class-animationnodeoutput"></a>

# AnimationNodeOutput

**Inherits:** [AnimationNode](class_animationnode.md#class-animationnode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

The animation output node of an [AnimationNodeBlendTree](class_animationnodeblendtree.md#class-animationnodeblendtree).

## Description

A node created automatically in an [AnimationNodeBlendTree](class_animationnodeblendtree.md#class-animationnodeblendtree) that outputs the final animation.
